structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Setpoint Mode Determination
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active setpoints are determined by Zone Group operating mode: occupied setpoints during Occupied, Warm-up, and Cooldown modes; unoccupied setpoints during Unoccupied, Setback, and Setup modes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Use occupied heating/cooling setpoints in Occupied, Warm-up, Cooldown modes; use unoccupied setpoints in Unoccupied, Setback, Setup modes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The active setpoint s shall be determined by the operating mode of the Zone Group (see Section 5.4.6). a. The set points shall be the occupied set points during occupied mode, warm -up mode , and cooldown mode . b. The set points shall be the unoccupied set points during unoccupied mode, setback mode , and setup mode .

evidence_quote: The active setpoint s shall be determined by the operating mode of the Zone Group (see Section 5.4.6). a. The set points shall be the occupied set points during occupied mode, warm -up mode , and cooldown mode . b. The set points shall be the unoccupied set points during unoccupied mode, setback mode , and setup mode .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Setpoint Overlap Prevention
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Software must enforce minimum 0.5°C (1°F) difference between heating and cooling setpoints, and prevent unoccupied heating from exceeding occupied heating or unoccupied cooling from being less than occupied cooling.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Heating setpoint ≤ cooling setpoint – 0.5°C (1°F); unoccupied heating ≤ occupied heating; unoccupied cooling ≥ occupied cooling.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The software shall prevent the following: a. The heating setpoint from exceeding the cooling setpoint minus 0.5°C (1°F) (i.e., the minimum difference between heating and cooling setpoint s shall be 0.5°C [1°F]). b. The unoccupied heating setpoint from exceeding the occupied heating setpoint . c. The unoccupied cooling setpoint from being less than the occupied cooling setpoint .

evidence_quote: The software shall prevent the following: a. The heating setpoint from exceeding the cooling setpoint minus 0.5°C (1°F) (i.e., the minimum difference between heating and cooling setpoint s shall be 0.5°C [1°F]). b. The unoccupied heating setpoint from exceeding the occupied heating setpoint . c. The unoccupied cooling setpoint from being less than the occupied cooling setpoint .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Local Setpoint Adjustment Limits
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Occupant setpoint adjustments are persistent offsets limited by absolute bounds: occupied cooling 22–27°C (72–80°F), occupied heating 18–22°C (65–72°F). Adjustments only affect occupied modes and are frozen during demand limiting.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Apply persistent offset within absolute limits; freeze adjustment during demand limiting; only affect occupied modes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: As a default, the active occupied cooling setpoint shall be lim ited between 22°C (72°F) and 27°C (80°F). As a default, the active occupied heating setpoint shall be limited between 18°C (65°F) and 22°C (72°F).

evidence_quote: As a default, the active occupied cooling setpoint shall be lim ited between 22°C (72°F) and 27°C (80°F). As a default, the active occupied heating setpoint shall be limited between 18°C (65°F) and 22°C (72°F).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Demand Limit Setpoint Adjustment
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a demand limit is imposed on the Zone Group, active cooling setpoints are increased by 0.5°C (1°F) at Level 1, 1°C (2°F) at Level 2, and 2°C (4°F) at Level 3. Changes are not cumulative.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Demand limit level imposed on Zone Group.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Increase active cooling setpoint by specified offset per demand limit level.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: At demand -limit Level 1, increase setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F). At demand -limit Level 2, increase setpoint by 1°C (2°F). At demand -limit Level 3, increase setpoint by 2°C (4°F).

evidence_quote: At demand -limit Level 1, increase setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F). At demand -limit Level 2, increase setpoint by 1°C (2°F). At demand -limit Level 3, increase setpoint by 2°C (4°F).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Demand Limit Setpoint Adjustment
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a demand limit is imposed on the Zone Group, active heating setpoints are decreased by 0.5°C (1°F) at Level 1, 1°C (2°F) at Level 2, and 2°C (4°F) at Level 3. Changes are not cumulative.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Demand limit level imposed on Zone Group.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Decrease active heating setpoint by specified offset per demand limit level.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: At demand -limit Level 1, decrease setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F). At demand -limit Level 2, decrease setpoint by 1°C (2°F). At demand -limit Level 3, decrease setpoint by 2°C (4°F).

evidence_quote: At demand -limit Level 1, decrease setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F). At demand -limit Level 2, decrease setpoint by 1°C (2°F). At demand -limit Level 3, decrease setpoint by 2°C (4°F).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Window Switch Setpoint Override
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a window switch indicates open, heating setpoint is temporarily set to 4°C (40°F) and cooling setpoint to 49°C (120°F). If open outside Occupied Mode, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Window switch indicates window is open.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set heating setpoint to 4°C (40°F), cooling setpoint to 49°C (120°F); generate Level 4 alarm if not in Occupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: For zones that have operable windows with indicator switches, when the window switch indicates the window is open, the heating setpoint shall be temporarily set to 4°C (40°F) and the cooling setpoint shall be temporarily set to 49°C (120°F). When the window switch indicates that the window is open during other than Occupied Mode , a Level 4 alarm shall be generated.

evidence_quote: For zones that have operable windows with indicator switches, when the window switch indicates the window is open, the heating setpoint shall be temporarily set to 4°C (40°F) and the cooling setpoint shall be temporarily set to 49°C (120°F). When the window switch indicates that the window is open during other than Occupied Mode , a Level 4 alarm shall be generated.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Occupancy Sensor Setback/Setup
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When unpopulated for 5 minutes during Occupied Mode, decrease heating setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F) and increase cooling setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F). Restore when populated for 1 minute.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Occupancy sensor indicates unpopulated for 5 minutes continuously during Occupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Decrease heating setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F), increase cooling setpoint by 0.5°C (1°F); restore after 1 minute of occupancy.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the switch indicates that the space has been unpopulated for 5 minutes continuously during the Occupied Mode , the active heating setpoint shall be decreased by 0.5°C (1°F) and the cooling setpoint shall be increased by 0.5°C (1°F). When the switch indicates that the space has been populated for 1 minute continuously, the active heating and cooling setpoint s shall be restored to their previous values.

evidence_quote: When the switch indicates that the space has been unpopulated for 5 minutes continuously during the Occupied Mode , the active heating setpoint shall be decreased by 0.5°C (1°F) and the cooling setpoint shall be increased by 0.5°C (1°F). When the switch indicates that the space has been populated for 1 minute continuously, the active heating and cooling setpoint s shall be restored to their previous values.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Setpoint Adjustment Priority Hierarchy
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Setpoint adjustments follow a priority order: (a) overlap restriction, (b) absolute limits on local adjustment, (c) window switches, (d) demand limit, (e) scheduled setpoints. Occupancy sensor offset is added to demand limit offset; local adjustment is frozen during demand limiting.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Apply adjustments in priority order; occupancy sensor offset additive to demand limit; freeze local adjustment during demand limiting.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The foll owing adjustment restrictions shall prevail in order from highest to lowest priority: a. Setpoint overlap restriction (Section 5.3.2.3.a ) b. Absolute limits on local setpoint adjustment (Section 5.3.2.5.b ) c. Window switches d. Demand limit 1. Occupancy sensors . Change of setpoint by occupancy sensor is added to change of setpoint by any dema nd limits in effect. 2. Local set-point adjustment . Any changes to setpoint by local adjustment are frozen at the onset of the demand limiting event and remain fixed for the duration of the event. Additional local adjustments are ignored for the duration of t he demand limiting event. e. Scheduled setpoint s based on Zone Group mode

evidence_quote: The foll owing adjustment restrictions shall prevail in order from highest to lowest priority: a. Setpoint overlap restriction (Section 5.3.2.3.a ) b. Absolute limits on local setpoint adjustment (Section 5.3.2.5.b ) c. Window switches d. Demand limit 1. Occupancy sensors . Change of setpoint by occupancy sensor is added to change of setpoint by any dema nd limits in effect. 2. Local set-point adjustment . Any changes to setpoint by local adjustment are frozen at the onset of the demand limiting event and remain fixed for the duration of the event. Additional local adjustments are ignored for the duration of t he demand limiting event. e. Scheduled setpoint s based on Zone Group mode

structured_payload_candidate.title: Local Override Occupied Mode Call
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When thermostat override buttons are pressed, send a call for Occupied Mode operation to the Zone Group control for 60 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send Occupied Mode call to Zone Group for 60 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When thermostat override buttons are depressed, the call for Occupied Mode operation shall be sent to the Zone Group control for 60 minutes.

evidence_quote: When thermostat override buttons are depressed, the call for Occupied Mode operation shall be sent to the Zone Group control for 60 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Loop Enable/Disable
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Heating Loop is enabled when space temperature is below heating setpoint and disabled when above heating setpoint and loop output is zero for 30 seconds. May remain active if integral windup is minimized.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Space temperature relative to heating setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable when space temp < heating setpoint; disable when space temp > heating setpoint and output zero for 30 s.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The Heating Loop shall be enabled whenever the space temperature is below the current zone heating set-point temperature and disabled when space temperature is above the current zone heating setpoi nt temperature and the loop output is zero for 30 seconds.

evidence_quote: The Heating Loop shall be enabled whenever the space temperature is below the current zone heating set-point temperature and disabled when space temperature is above the current zone heating setpoi nt temperature and the loop output is zero for 30 seconds.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Loop Enable/Disable
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Cooling Loop is enabled when space temperature is above cooling setpoint and disabled when below cooling setpoint and loop output is zero for 30 seconds. May remain active if integral windup is minimized.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Space temperature relative to cooling setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable when space temp > cooling setpoint; disable when space temp < cooling setpoint and output zero for 30 s.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The Cooling Loop shall be enabled whenever the space temperature is above the current zone cooling set-point temperature and disabled when space temperature is below the current zone cooling set-point temperature and the loop output is zero for 30 seconds.

evidence_quote: The Cooling Loop shall be enabled whenever the space temperature is above the current zone cooling set-point temperature and disabled when space temperature is below the current zone cooling set-point temperature and the loop output is zero for 30 seconds.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Loop Output Range
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Cooling Loop output is a software point ranging from 0% (no cooling) to 100% (full cooling).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The output of the loop shall be a software point ranging from 0% (no cooling) to 100% (full cooling).

evidence_quote: The output of the loop shall be a software point ranging from 0% (no cooling) to 100% (full cooling).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Loop Output Range
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Heating Loop output is a software point ranging from 0% (no heating) to 100% (full heating).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The output of the loop shall be a software point ranging from 0% (no heating) to 100% (full heating).

evidence_quote: The output of the loop shall be a software point ranging from 0% (no heating) to 100% (full heating).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Control Loop Type Requirement
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Loops must use proportional+integral logic or equivalent; proportional-only is not acceptable. Integral gain shall be small relative to proportional gain. P and I gains are operator adjustable.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Use PI control; integral gain small relative to proportional; gains adjustable.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Loops shall use proportional + integral logic or other technology with similar performance. Proportional -only control is not acceptable, although the integral gain shall be small relative to the proportional gain. P and I gains shall be adjustable by the operator.

evidence_quote: Loops shall use proportional + integral logic or other technology with similar performance. Proportional -only control is not acceptable, although the integral gain shall be small relative to the proportional gain. P and I gains shall be adjustable by the operator.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone State Determination
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Zone state is Heating when Heating Loop output > 0 and Cooling Loop output = 0; Cooling when Cooling Loop output > 0 and Heating Loop output = 0; Deadband otherwise.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set zone state based on loop outputs.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Heating . When the output of the space Heating Loop is nonzero and the output of the Cooling Loop is equal to zero. Cooling . When the output of the space Cooling Loop is nonzero and the output of the Heating Loop is equal to zero. Deadband . When not in either heating or cooling .

evidence_quote: Heating . When the output of the space Heating Loop is nonzero and the output of the Cooling Loop is equal to zero. Cooling . When the output of the space Cooling Loop is nonzero and the output of the Heating Loop is equal to zero. Deadband . When not in either heating or cooling .

structured_payload_candidate.title: High Zone Temperature Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 4 alarm if zone temperature is 2°C (3°F) above cooling setpoint for 10 minutes; Level 3 alarm if 3°C (5°F) above cooling setpoint for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by threshold for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm at 2°C (3°F) above; Level 3 at 3°C (5°F) above.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Zone temperature above cooling setpoint by threshold for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the zone is 2°C (3°F) above cooling setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm. If the zone is 3°C (5°F) above cooling setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the zone is 2°C (3°F) above cooling setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm. If the zone is 3°C (5°F) above cooling setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Zone Temperature Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 4 alarm if zone temperature is 2°C (3°F) below heating setpoint for 10 minutes; Level 3 alarm if 3°C (5°F) below heating setpoint for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature below heating setpoint by threshold for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm at 2°C (3°F) below; Level 3 at 3°C (5°F) below.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Zone temperature below heating setpoint by threshold for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the zone is 2°C (3°F) below heating setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm. If the zone is 3°C (5°F) below heating setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the zone is 2°C (3°F) below heating setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm. If the zone is 3°C (5°F) below heating setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Temperature Alarm Suppression
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Suppress zone temperature alarms after setpoint change per Section 5.1.20 and while Zone Group is in Warmup or Cooldown Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Setpoint change or Zone Group in Warmup/Cooldown Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Suppress zone temperature alarms as follows: 1. After zone setpoi nt is changed per Section 5.1.20 . 2. While Zone Group is in Warmup Mode or Cooldown Mode .

evidence_quote: Suppress zone temperature alarms as follows: 1. After zone setpoi nt is changed per Section 5.1.20 . 2. While Zone Group is in Warmup Mode or Cooldown Mode .
